detailed model output for Jupiter's 100-mbar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
this is the isobaric shape model at 100 mbar; see jupiter_model_reference_geoid.txt for an accompanying reference geoid rotating rigidly at system III.
mu=sin(phi), phi [radians], and lat_deg [degrees] refer to planetocentric latitude; lat_pg_deg gives planetographic latitude in degrees.
